markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential use cases for AI to augment Homebase's customer support operations](https://fathom.video/share/R3ybx93YAdzUZTa36uBcQafmyZyR8jbv?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Homebase has high volumes of inbound customer interactions (calls, emails, chats) that could benefit from AI assistance](https://fathom.video/share/R3ybx93YAdzUZTa36uBcQafmyZyR8jbv?tab=summary&timestamp=8.0)
  - [Key areas of interest: knowledge base content review, case summarization, case categorization, sentiment analysis](https://fathom.video/share/R3ybx93YAdzUZTa36uBcQafmyZyR8jbv?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Potential to reduce manual effort and increase accuracy/consistency](https://fathom.video/share/R3ybx93YAdzUZTa36uBcQafmyZyR8jbv?tab=summary&timestamp=118.0)
  - [Next steps are to identify specific workflows to pilot and involve Homebase team in iterative development](https://fathom.video/share/R3ybx93YAdzUZTa36uBcQafmyZyR8jbv?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)

## Topics

### Background and Context

  - [Ben leads the customer support team at Homebase](https://fathom.video/share/R3ybx93YAdzUZTa36uBcQafmyZyR8jbv?tab=summary&timestamp=86.0)
  - [Team handles product support, sales inquiries, knowledge base management](https://fathom.video/share/R3ybx93YAdzUZTa36uBcQafmyZyR8jbv?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)
  - [High volumes: \~2500 calls, 5000 emails, 1000 chats per week](https://fathom.video/share/R3ybx93YAdzUZTa36uBcQafmyZyR8jbv?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)
  - [Currently using Salesforce, Talkdesk and limited manual QA](https://fathom.video/share/R3ybx93YAdzUZTa36uBcQafmyZyR8jbv?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)

### Knowledge Base Content Review

  - [Need to regularly review \~1000 KB articles for accuracy, SEO optimization](https://fathom.video/share/R3ybx93YAdzUZTa36uBcQafmyZyR8jbv?tab=summary&timestamp=416.0)
  - [Opportunity for AI to augment single person doing this manually](https://fathom.video/share/R3ybx93YAdzUZTa36uBcQafmyZyR8jbv?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

### Case Summarization and Categorization

  - [Agents currently write case summaries and categorize cases manually](https://fathom.video/share/R3ybx93YAdzUZTa36uBcQafmyZyR8jbv?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
  - [Opportunity for AI to automate summarization and categorization](https://fathom.video/share/R3ybx93YAdzUZTa36uBcQafmyZyR8jbv?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
  - [Reduce after-call work time and increase consistency](https://fathom.video/share/R3ybx93YAdzUZTa36uBcQafmyZyR8jbv?tab=summary&timestamp=526.0)

### Sentiment Analysis and QA

  - [Limited manual QA being done on small sample of calls](https://fathom.video/share/R3ybx93YAdzUZTa36uBcQafmyZyR8jbv?tab=summary&timestamp=1351.0)
  - [Opportunity for AI to analyze all calls for quality, coaching opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/R3ybx93YAdzUZTa36uBcQafmyZyR8jbv?tab=summary&timestamp=1351.0)
  - [Potential to reduce manual QA effort](https://fathom.video/share/R3ybx93YAdzUZTa36uBcQafmyZyR8jbv?tab=summary&timestamp=1413.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to create Slack channels for each use case workflow](https://fathom.video/share/R3ybx93YAdzUZTa36uBcQafmyZyR8jbv?tab=summary&timestamp=1769.0)
  - [Homebase to share additional context/data to enable scoping](https://fathom.video/share/R3ybx93YAdzUZTa36uBcQafmyZyR8jbv?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
  - [Marcel to consolidate learnings and propose pilot workflows](https://fathom.video/share/R3ybx93YAdzUZTa36uBcQafmyZyR8jbv?tab=summary&timestamp=1769.0)
  - [Iterative development with Homebase team involvement](https://fathom.video/share/R3ybx93YAdzUZTa36uBcQafmyZyR8jbv?tab=summary&timestamp=1787.0)
